value.reason: The cited page explicitly documents the "Skills" feature for this provider (Google / Antigravity / Gemini CLI), including the exact directory paths (.agents/skills/ and ~/.gemini/config/skills/), the SKILL.md file format, and the progressive-discovery mechanism by which the agent auto-applies a skill when context matches without explicit invocation. The page even provides a worked example of a code-review skill, directly tying the feature to the capability being evaluated. The label "Skills" matches the page's own heading and feature name. The description accurately reflects the page: skills are reusable instruction packages stored as SKILL.md files in the two documented directories, the agent auto-discovers and applies them based on context, and no explicit invocation is required. No material claims in the description are invented or contradict the page.
